hooks.command:
cat | nu --stdin -c 'let input = ($in | from json); let sid = ($input | get session_id); let prompt = ($input | get prompt); let ts = (date now | format date "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"); let dir = ($env.HOME | path join "prompts"); mkdir $dir; let file = ($dir | path join $"($sid).md"); $"## ($ts)

($prompt)

" | save --append $file' || true
